feat_sparring_partner_base.name: Sparring Partner
feat_sparring_partner_base.description: Only at level 0, your hit point maximum increases by 1.

feat_whence_you_came_sparring.name: From Whence You Came
feat_whence_you_came_sparring.description: Once you level out of this class (reach level 1), you gain one of the following feats based on your martial focus: Crusher (Aspiration), Piercer (Aspiration), or Slasher (Aspiration).

feat_crusher_asp.name: Crusher (Aspiration)
feat_crusher_asp.description:
Once per turn, when you hit a creature with an attack that deals bludgeoning damage, you can move it 1.5 meters to an unoccupied space, provided the target is no more than one size larger than you.
When you score a critical hit that deals bludgeoning damage to a creature, attack rolls against that creature are made with advantage until the start of your next turn.

feat_piercer_asp.name: Piercer (Aspiration)
feat_piercer_asp.description:
Once per turn, when you hit a creature with an attack that deals piercing damage, you can reroll one of the attack's damage dice, and you must use the new roll.
When you score a critical hit that deals piercing damage to a creature, you can roll one additional damage die when determining the extra piercing damage the target takes.

feat_slasher_asp.name: Slasher (Aspiration)
feat_slasher_asp.description:
Once per turn when you hit a creature with an attack that deals slashing damage, you can reduce the speed of the target by 3 meters (10 feet) until the start of your next turn.
When you score a critical hit that deals slashing damage to a creature, you grievously wound it. Until the start of your next turn, the target has disadvantage on all attack rolls.

aspirations.name: Warrior
aspirations.description: A foundational martial path focusing on basic combat techniques and physical conditioning.
aspirations.starting_equipment:
You start with the following equipment, in addition to the equipment granted by your background:
* 15 gold pieces
* Common clothes, 2 rations, waterskin
